props.covers: Three size classes only — S chips at 0.72x, M standard members at 1x, L terminals and emphasis at 1.35x — ranked per leaf by area percentile, with the sticky 384x288 override where the drop default misrepresents the boards.

text.insert: S chips at 0.72x, M standard members at 1x, L terminals and emphasis at 1.35x. Cells of one grid always share a size.

The three classes are ranked per leaf by area percentile. S covers compact operands, icons, and action triangles (intent-2's 128x112 actions, gc's 160x64 curator). M is the workhorse process/pill/card size; template members of one lattice are always the same class. L marks end states and decision hubs (ink's 192x192 completion ellipses, gc's 256x112 exact-match decision, intent-2's 256x144 classify pentagons). Type extents come from the canvas drop defaults scaled by
One corpus override where the drop default misrepresents the boards: stickies expand from a 384x288 base (
). Corpus stickies run 336-608 wide and 112-688 tall, median about 400x320; the 176x128 drop default collapses every relation through a sticky rail.
